optional_improvements: Add a small UI test pass (Playwright/manual script) that verifies deep-review cap enforcement across a same-day session boundary and after refresh.
Persist deep-review daily count to cloud for logged-in users to avoid device-specific cap drift.
Expose priority score/debug hint in dev mode to make future queue-order regressions easier to diagnose.
summary: Implementation is correct and scope-aligned for Phase 2b: Study Plan with Target Date is added, deep review daily cap and priority sorting are integrated, statistics are extended, and exam-specific wording is removed. Build is green and no blocking defects were identified, so this is ready to ship.
